ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a wheel of fortune website where users can spin the wheel to win prizes. The website should have functionalities for spinning the wheel, displaying prizes, and recording user winning records. Users should be able to spin the wheel, view the prize list, view their own winning records. Use light gray as the default background and dark red for component styling.

evaluation_checklist.question: Spin the wheel to initiate a gameplay session.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The wheel spins, stops at a segment, and displays the prize won without any errors.

evaluation_checklist.question: View the list of available prizes before spinning the wheel.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: A complete and accurate list of prizes is displayed, matching the set prizes available on the wheel.

evaluation_checklist.question: After spinning the wheel, navigate to the section displaying user winning records.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The user's winning record is updated to include the latest prize won, with correct details on date and prize.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify that the website uses 'light gray' as the background color and 'dark red' as the component color, as specified in the design requirements.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The website has a background color of 'light gray' and components (such as buttons, cards, headers, etc.) are styled with the color 'dark red', accurately reflecting the design instruction.

ui_instruct.task: Spin the wheel to initiate a gameplay session.
ui_instruct.expected_result: The wheel spins, stops at a segment, and displays the prize won without any errors.

ui_instruct.task: View the list of available prizes before spinning the wheel.
ui_instruct.expected_result: A complete and accurate list of prizes is displayed, matching the set prizes available on the wheel.

ui_instruct.task: After spinning the wheel, navigate to the section displaying user winning records.
ui_instruct.expected_result: The user's winning record is updated to include the latest prize won, with correct details on date and prize.

ui_instruct.task: Verify that the website uses 'light gray' as the background color and 'dark red' as the component color, as specified in the design requirements.
ui_instruct.expected_result: The website has a background color of 'light gray' and components (such as buttons, cards, headers, etc.) are styled with the color 'dark red', accurately reflecting the design instruction.

oracle_slots.original_task: View the list of available prizes before spinning the wheel.
oracle_slots.expected_result: A complete and accurate list of prizes is displayed, matching the set prizes available on the wheel.

oracle_slots.original_task: After spinning the wheel, navigate to the section displaying user winning records.
oracle_slots.expected_result: The user's winning record is updated to include the latest prize won, with correct details on date and prize.

oracle_slots.original_task: Verify that the website uses 'light gray' as the background color and 'dark red' as the component color, as specified in the design requirements.
oracle_slots.expected_result: The website has a background color of 'light gray' and components (such as buttons, cards, headers, etc.) are styled with the color 'dark red', accurately reflecting the design instruction.

oracle_slots.expected_result: No unrequested elements or functionalities should be present on the page.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny and the next it’s pouring rain. Anyway, speaking of unpredictability, wouldn’t it be fun to create a wheel of fortune website? Imagine users spinning a wheel to win prizes, like a fun little game to brighten their day! They could spin the wheel, and oh, I heard from a friend that they won a gift card last week, which got me thinking about how exciting it would be to display a list of prizes on this site. And, of course, we should definitely let users keep track of their winning records, just like how I keep track of my favorite recipes. By the way, I had this amazing dinner last night, and it made me realize how important it is to have a nice light gray background on the site, so it’s easy on the eyes, and maybe we can style the components in a dark red to make everything pop! But honestly, I can’t stop thinking about how my neighbor is always complaining about their lawn. Anyway, back to the website! Users really should be able to spin the wheel, view the prize list, and check their winning records. It’ll be a blast!

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a customer relationship management website for managing sales leads and reporting. The website should have functionalities for automated message sending, organizing and categorizing leads, updating lead information and status, updating settings and dropdown menus, and reporting. Users should be able to browse and manage sales leads, view reports, and receive best practice and integration advice. Define background as papaya whip; define components with dark orange.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify that the "Add New Lead" form allows users to fill out and submit details correctly.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The form submissions successfully add the lead to the system.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test the automated message-sending functionality by initiating a message to a specific lead.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The message is sent automatically, and a confirmation notification is displayed.

evaluation_checklist.question: Confirm that lead information can be updated by modifying an existing lead's status.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The lead’s status is successfully updated, and the new status is accurately displayed on the lead’s profile.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test website navigation by using the provided menu to access the best practice and integration advice section.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The relevant page is successfully loaded, and users can view the information on best practices and integration advice.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it's sunny and the next it's pouring rain. Speaking of unpredictability, have you ever tried to implement a customer relationship management website? It's like managing sales leads can feel like herding cats sometimes! Anyway, I heard that the new café downtown has the best pastries; I can't wait to check it out after work. So, back to the website, right? It should totally have these functionalities like automated message sending, which is super crucial because who has time to send messages manually? And organizing leads, oh boy, that's like organizing your sock drawer! You definitely want to categorize them too, like how I categorize my favorite TV shows. Updating lead info is a must; it’s like keeping your plants watered, you know? And settings? Don’t even get me started on dropdown menus! I mean, have you seen how many options some of these websites have? It’s like a buffet of choices! And reports, yes, those are important too, like when you need to impress your boss after a long day of dealing with competitors who just don’t get it. Oh, and speaking of colors, I really think background colors can set the mood; like, have you ever tried papaya whip? It’s such a cheerful color! And dark orange for components? That sounds vibrant! Anyway, I really hope the café has those pastries; they say a good pastry can make your day so much better!

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a website for a credit repair company to generate leads. The website should have a form-filling function, allowing users to input personal information and credit status. The website should also have a credit score inquiry function and an introduction to credit repair services. Users can browse the website, learn about credit repair services, and fill out the form to submit lead information. Set old lace as the body background and use rosy brown for the UI.

evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The form should submit successfully without errors, and a confirmation message should display indicating the lead information was recorded.

evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The system should process the inquiry without errors and provide appropriate feedback or next steps for the user regarding their credit score.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny and the next it’s pouring! Anyway, speaking of unpredictable things, have you heard about that new restaurant that just opened up downtown? I tried their pasta last night, and it was just okay, not as good as everyone was raving about. But back to business, if you’re looking to implement a website for a credit repair company, you should definitely include a form-filling function. Imagine users inputting their personal information and credit status, while they’re sipping on their coffee and chatting about last weekend’s game! Oh, and don’t forget to have a credit score inquiry function, so users can see where they stand. It’s like checking the weather before heading out, right? Plus, an introduction to credit repair services is a must! Users can browse the website, learn about credit repair services, and fill out the form to submit lead information, just like how I submit my thoughts to my friends after a long day. And you know what would really tie it all together? Setting old lace as the body background and using rosy brown for the UI. Just makes everything feel cozy, like a warm blanket on a chilly evening!

ground_truth_instruction: Please create a one-page website for promoting Fundraiser Day, including introduction to the event, fundraiser testimonials, offer information, and company information. The website should have functionalities such as an automatically moving carousel for displaying offers, a section for displaying fundraiser testimonials, and a section for displaying company information. Users should be able to browse the website to learn more about the Fundraiser Day event. Establish cornsilk as the main background and peru for the controls.

evaluation_checklist.question: Check the accuracy of content within the introduction section about Fundraiser Day.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The introduction should clearly explain what Fundraiser Day is about, including its purpose and significance, aligning with the event's promotional goals.

evaluation_checklist.question: Validate the presence and correctness of fundraiser testimonials.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The testimonials section should display real and relevant feedback from previous fundraiser participants, demonstrating positive experiences and successful outcomes.

evaluation_checklist.question: Ensure that the company information section is visible and accurate.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The section should provide complete and correct details about the company, including its mission, background, and role in organizing Fundraiser Day.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test the website's navigation to ensure users can easily access between the introduction, testimonials, offers, and company information sections.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Users should be able to smoothly navigate between the introduction, testimonials, offers, and company information sections with no broken links or errors.

evaluation_checklist.question: Assess the website's content for relevance to the Fundraiser Day promotion.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: All text and multimedia content should focus on promoting Fundraiser Day, eliminating any unrelated information that could detract from the event's promotion.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify that the website uses 'cornsilk' as the background color and 'peru' as the component color, as specified in the design requirements.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny and the next it’s pouring! Anyway, have you heard about that new café that opened downtown? They have the best pastries! Speaking of which, I really need to get my hands on some of those. But back to the task at hand, I guess we need to whip up a one-page website, right? So, like, we should totally have an introduction to this Fundraiser Day event, and maybe throw in some testimonials from people who’ve attended before. Oh, and we can't forget to include some info about the offers – they really need to pop! I mean, who doesn’t love a good deal? And while we're at it, let's add some company info too, because people love to know who they're dealing with. I imagine a nice carousel that moves automatically to showcase those offers, but honestly, I could really go for a slice of chocolate cake right now. Anyway, let’s make sure the background is cornsilk, whatever that is, and we can use peru for the controls. Sounds good, right?

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a customer support chatbot on the website that can provide customer support and handle customer interactions. The chatbot should be able to answer frequently asked questions, provide product information, and assist users in completing orders. Users should be able to interact with the chatbot through a chat interface to get the information and help they need. Implement styling with snow for the background and dim gray for components.

evaluation_checklist.question: Initiate a conversation with the chatbot by typing "What are your frequently asked questions?"
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The chatbot responds with a list of frequently asked questions without delay.

evaluation_checklist.question: Type "I need help with placing an order" into the chatbot interface.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The chatbot guides the user through the order placement process clearly and effectively.

evaluation_checklist.question: Enter the question "How can I return a product?" into the chatbot.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The chatbot responds with the correct procedure for returning a product.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test the chatbot's capability to handle incorrect input by typing a nonsensical string such as "asdfghjkl".
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The chatbot politely alerts the user that the input was not understood and prompts to rephrase or ask another question.

evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The website has a background color of 'snow' and components (such as buttons, cards, headers, etc.) are styled with the color 'dim gray', accurately reflecting the design instruction.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny and the next it’s pouring rain. Speaking of unpredictable, have you ever tried to implement a customer support chatbot on a website? It’s kind of like trying to make dinner when you realize you’re out of half the ingredients. Anyway, if you do decide to tackle that, make sure it can handle customer interactions, you know, like answering those frequently asked questions that everyone seems to have. And don’t forget about product information—people love that stuff! Oh, and I heard a rumor that our competitors are really struggling with their chat interfaces. It’s almost laughable, right? But seriously, users should be able to interact with the chatbot easily to get the information and help they need. And hey, if you can implement some cool styling, like snow for the background and dim gray for the components, that would be a nice touch. Just make sure it doesn’t end up looking like a snowstorm hit the website!

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a travel reimbursement and payment system for employee travel expenses. The system should have functionalities for booking tickets, hotels, and trains, generating settlements, submitting reimbursement applications, and more. Users should be able to book tickets, hotels, and trains, generate settlements report, submit reimbursement applications, and view reimbursement status. Use white for container backgrounds and navy for component visuals.

evaluation_checklist.question: Navigate to the ticket booking section and book a flight ticket.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The ticket booking form submits successfully, and a confirmation message or booking summary is displayed.

evaluation_checklist.question: Navigate to the hotel booking section and attempt to book a hotel room.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The hotel booking form submits successfully, and a confirmation message or booking summary is displayed.

evaluation_checklist.question: Go to the train booking section and book a train ticket.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The train booking form submits successfully, and a confirmation message or booking summary is displayed.

evaluation_checklist.question: Access the reimbursement application section and submit a new reimbursement request.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The reimbursement application form submits successfully, and a confirmation notification or reference number is displayed.

evaluation_checklist.question: Generate a settlement report for recent travel expenses.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The system generates a settlement report and displays it correctly on the screen or provides an option to download it.

evaluation_checklist.question: Navigate to the reimbursement status page to view the status of a submitted reimbursement request.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The user can view the status of their submitted reimbursement application, with accurate and up-to-date information displayed.

oracle_slots.original_task: Generate a settlement report for recent travel expenses.
oracle_slots.expected_result: The system generates a settlement report and displays it correctly on the screen or provides an option to download it.

oracle_slots.original_task: Navigate to the reimbursement status page to view the status of a submitted reimbursement request.
oracle_slots.expected_result: The user can view the status of their submitted reimbursement application, with accurate and up-to-date information displayed.

oracle_slots.original_task: Verify that the website uses 'white' as the background color and 'navy' as the component color, as specified in the design requirements.
oracle_slots.expected_result: The website has a background color of 'white' and components (such as buttons, cards, headers, etc.) are styled with the color 'navy', accurately reflecting the design instruction.

oracle_slots.original_task: Check for any UI elements or functionalities not explicitly requested in the original instruction.
oracle_slots.expected_result: No unrequested elements or functionalities should be present on the page.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny and the next it’s pouring rain! Anyway, speaking of travel, I really think we should implement a travel reimbursement and payment system for employee travel expenses. It’s such a hassle when you have to figure out how to book tickets, hotels, and trains, right? I mean, who even has the time? And don’t get me started on generating settlements; it’s like a maze! Plus, submitting reimbursement applications can be such a chore. Oh, and did you hear about that new restaurant that opened up downtown? They say the food is amazing! But back to the point, we really need to make sure users can book tickets, hotels, and trains easily, generate settlements reports, and check on their reimbursement status. By the way, I had the most delicious dinner last night; it was so comforting! Anyway, let’s keep the container backgrounds white and the visuals navy, just to keep things looking sharp amidst all this chaos!
